Body.Content:
We're introducing the ability to save meeting invites as drafts on mobile. This feature allows users to begin composing a meeting and return to it later without sending the invite immediately—helping them stay organized and flexible when scheduling. Updated February 13, 2026: This item is still rolling and has not completed yet. We apologize for any inconvenience.

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Save an Event as a Draft on iOS
